hero.name: Raphael Martins
hero.slogan: I turn ideas and processes into useful, scalable systems.
hero.slogan_title: Software architecture, SaaS, and high-traffic e-commerce with hands-on AI integration.
hero.slogan_subtitle: 20+ years turning complex business rules into digital products — from idea conception to deployment.

about.title: About
about.intro: Full Stack Software Engineer with 20+ years of experience in architecture and development of web applications, SaaS platforms, and high-traffic e-commerce systems. Based in Salvador, BA, Brazil — available for remote projects worldwide.
about.work: Solid experience in enterprise environments with complex business rules: large-scale projects at Grupo Casas Bahia (Via Varejo — Brazil's largest retail group), Infracommerce (Unilever's B2B e-commerce), and mission-critical systems in the travel insurance sector (Coris). Driven by direct business impact with a proven track record of delivery under pressure.
about.skills: Backend expertise in PHP/Laravel, REST APIs, complex integrations (SOAP, webhooks, ERPs), and modern frontend with Vue 3/Nuxt 3 + TypeScript. Experience with React/Next.js, Inertia.js, and legacy stacks. DevOps with Docker, Kubernetes, GitHub Actions, Linux VPS, and cloud (AWS, Azure, GCP). Technical SEO, Google Tag Manager, GA4/DataLayer, and Adobe Analytics.
about.experience: At Grupo Casas Bahia, I built a custom Tag Manager that eliminated the need for change management approval — reducing integration publishing from days to minutes. Participated in 3+ Black Friday editions ensuring stability during peak traffic. At Infracommerce, I maintained SOAP integrations with national suppliers for automated B2B order transmission. At DQR Tech, I resolved performance bottlenecks in reports processing 50K+ historical records.
about.products: I build my own SaaS products: Trady.chat (trader ecosystem with gamified diary, AI-powered economic calendar, and real-time B3 quotes via WebSockets), DopaCheck (habit tracking with social accountability and WhatsApp check-in), Rateio Justo (AI-first bill splitting, serverless on Vercel with PIX payments), and mkit.com.br (micro bio sites for creators with Instagram Graph API).
about.freelance: As a freelancer, I've delivered high-impact automation projects: FIES enrollment automation for FTC University via web scraping (eliminating 100% manual process), FGTS individualization for Brazilian municipalities (integration with Caixa Econômica Federal's REMAG/SEFIP systems), corporate websites for Shopping Iguatemi Salvador, and the GlobalCard student ID card system.
about.trading: In the financial market, I've built MQL5 bots for MetaTrader 5 and real-time Forex/B3 data ingestion features. Intermediate/technical English — advanced reading and writing, intermediate conversation.

items.description: Own SaaS products, on-demand solutions, and AI-powered automations. High-impact projects: FIES enrollment automation (web scraping), FGTS individualization (Caixa Econômica integration), e-commerce and custom systems

items.company: DQR Tech · Coris — Sr. Full Stack Developer
items.description: Travel insurance claims management system. PHP 7.4, SQL Server, Azure. Report optimization with 50K+ records, legacy code refactoring
Complete SaaS frontend architecture in Nuxt 3 + TypeScript. Custom design system, REST API integration with C# backend. Delivered on time under contractual penalty clause

items.company: Infracommerce · Unilever — Sr. Full Stack Developer
items.description: B2B enterprise e-commerce Compra Food Service (Unilever). PHP, MySQL, Vue.js, jQuery. SOAP integrations with national supplier network, high transaction volume

items.company: Via Varejo / FCamara — Sr. Front-End Developer
items.description: Grupo Casas Bahia (Brazil's largest retail). Custom Tag Manager without change management, 3+ Black Fridays, mobile site AngularJS/TypeScript/Cordova. Award-winning features
Insurance brokers qualification portal. Full ASP to WordPress migration, internal systems, Mailchimp newsletter automation. Sole person responsible for all technology

items.company: Malagueta / Nomad Interativo — Full Stack Developer
items.description: Digital agency. Corporate websites in PHP/WordPress for Shopping Iguatemi Salvador and Bahia State Government. GlobalCard student ID card system
Cluster of 16 tourism portals. ColdFusion → PHP migration, proprietary CMS, lead distribution system for travel agents with automatic routing

formation.title: Education & Certifications

items.name: MultiCloud, DevOps & AI
items.description: AWS, Azure, Google Cloud, Terraform, Docker, Kubernetes, and AI Agents — hands-on real-world projects

formation.complementary: Complemented by courses in advanced PHP, modern JavaScript, software architecture, and AI integration.

tradychat.name: Trady.chat
tradychat.description: Day-trading diary with voice, screenshots, S-curve, economic calendar, and real-time quotes.
tradychat.longDescription: Trady.chat moved away from the broader ecosystem concept and is now centered on what actually differentiates the product: a day-trading diary with voice capture, screenshot attachments from entries/charts, S-curve tracking, and capital evolution monitoring. The flow also integrates an economic calendar with AI explanations for high-impact events and volatility context, plus real-time quotes to support review and decision-making. The intent is to turn the trading routine into an ongoing log that is useful for study and later analysis, with a more practical experience than a loose set of separate modules.
highlights: Trade diary with audio, screenshots, and capital tracking
S-curve and performance evolution for review
Economic calendar with AI explaining volatility-impacting events
Real-time quotes integrated into the experience
Node.js + Puppeteer scraper for economic events
Next.js front + Laravel backend with Docker and GitHub Actions

dopacheck.name: DopaCheck
dopacheck.description: Mobile-first habit tracking webapp with WhatsApp and web check-ins.
dopacheck.longDescription: DopaCheck was built to reduce friction in habit tracking and personal challenges. Instead of depending on multiple apps, the flow keeps everything inside a simple, social, and fast experience by using WhatsApp as a primary entry point. It is designed for communities and groups that need accountability, with image check-ins, a visual dashboard, challenges, public profiles, and a premium layer with automation and AI-assisted content analysis.

rateiojusto.name: Rateio Justo
rateiojusto.description: Serverless web app for fair bill splitting in groups and social events.
rateiojusto.longDescription: Rateio Justo was created to solve a recurring social problem: splitting shared expenses without conflict, in a clear and adaptable way. The product combines bill splitting, simplified item entry, AI support for reading and suggesting amounts, geolocation, and payment flows. The intent is to move from a shared bill to a transparent, shareable, and fast settlement with minimal UI friction.

mkit.name: MediaKit · MicroBio Site
mkit.description: Media kit ecosystem with a public bio site, dashboard, and Instagram data.
mkit.longDescription: MKit was designed as a complete solution for creators to present credibility to brands without relying on static PDFs or direct-message exchanges. The product is split into frontend and backend: `mkit-web` delivers the landing page, the public creator bio by handle, and the authenticated dashboard; `mkit-api` handles Instagram OAuth, profile/post/metrics synchronization, and the public creator data model. Together they form a mobile-first product centered on SEO, social proof, continuous updates, and commercially useful context for recruiters and builders.
highlights: Nuxt 3 frontend with SSR for public pages and dashboard
Public creator bio by handle with dynamic SEO
Authenticated dashboard for portfolio and settings
CI/CD to VPS with GitHub Actions in both repos

investnews.name: InvestNews
investnews.description: News and real-time quotes system for investors.
investnews.longDescription: InvestNews was built as a technical challenge for Investidor10, but the product reading goes beyond the test: it is a platform for investors to track news, categories, and market quotes in real time in one place. The backend concentrates authentication, content administration, caching, queues, and live broadcasting; the React frontend delivers both the public area and the admin panel in a single deploy. The project combines performance, SEO on public pages, and an infrastructure base designed for real operation with Docker Compose, Redis, Horizon, and Reverb.
highlights: Public area with multi-token search and category filtering
News detail pages by slug with SEO focus
Admin panel with CRUD for categories, news, and instruments
Async contact handling with Redis + Horizon
investnews.deployment: Docker Compose (nginx + php-fpm + mysql + redis + horizon + reverb)

personalhub.name: Personal Hub
personalhub.description: Personal hub in WhatsApp and dashboard for automations, bills, and opportunity curation.
personalhub.longDescription: Raphael Personal HUB acts as a real-life command center, with WhatsApp and a web dashboard as the main interfaces. It already scrapes Coelba and Embasa bills, detects invoices close to their due date, and sends WhatsApp notifications with amount, consumption, status, and the bill PDF attached for payment. It also organizes and classifies Threads posts and comments about side income, using AI for the first pass and human curation afterward. On top of that, it monitors specific WhatsApp groups and chats to summarize and classify messages with hybrid AI: Ollama on the VPS when possible, Groq as fallback, and OpenAI/Anthropic when needed. The current refactor aims to turn the MVP into a more generic automation platform, reusing the flows already proven in production.
highlights: WhatsApp alerts with amount, consumption, and PDF
Threads scraping for side-income with human curation
Summaries and classification for WhatsApp groups/chats
Hybrid AI with Ollama, Groq, OpenAI, and Anthropic
NeuronAI to swap providers without rewriting tools

geradorcontratos.name: Real Estate Contract Generator
geradorcontratos.description: Mobile-first editor for real estate contracts without breaking layout.
geradorcontratos.longDescription: The Real Estate Contract Generator was born from the real pain of editing contracts directly on a phone without breaking layout or losing content. The goal is to offer a mobile-first experience so the broker can safely adjust documents without relying on generic tools that do not respect the contract format. The module brief already points to an intelligent real estate document assistant focused on block-based editing, vision-based extraction, and professional PDF generation.
highlights: Prevents layout breakage and content loss
Foundation for quick generation and review

dfacaosocial.name: Daiane Freitas Social Action
dfacaosocial.description: Volunteer institutional site for Daiane Freitas Social Action.
dfacaosocial.longDescription: A volunteer project created to give the Daiane Freitas Social Action institute/NGO a digital presence. The goal is a simple, clear, and easy-to-maintain institutional site focused on presenting the organization, its actions, contact paths, and support channels. The work was done as a practical VibeCoding experiment in Google's Antigravity IDE, using the free tier for quick testing and validation. The architecture follows a monorepo with a Next.js frontend deployed on Vercel, a SlimPHP backend, and Supabase as the database, prioritizing low operational friction and fast publishing.
highlights: Volunteer project for an NGO / institutional website
Monorepo with Next.js frontend and SlimPHP backend
VibeCoding tests in Google's Antigravity IDE
Content focused on contact, support, and visibility

igcarousel.name: IG Carousel Generator
igcarousel.description: Instagram carousel generator from an idea or topic.
igcarousel.longDescription: IG Carousel Generator was designed to speed up Instagram content creation without forcing the user to start from scratch. The idea is to turn a topic, brief, or post intention into a ready-to-edit carousel inside the browser. The product runs on Next.js and Vercel, uses shadcn/ui for the interface, authenticates with Clerk, and integrates OpenAI to help structure and build the cards. The payment flow with Mercado Pago and delivery by email through Resend are still pending, but they are part of the product vision.
highlights: Generate cards from an idea / topic
OpenAI used to structure the carousel

pequenosabordo.name: Pequenos a Bordo
pequenosabordo.description: Showcase site for renting baby seats, strollers, and infant products in Salvador.
pequenosabordo.longDescription: Pequenos a Bordo is a showcase site built for a local business that rents baby seats, strollers, and other infant products for families traveling to Salvador. It solves a practical problem: bringing these items while traveling is costly and cumbersome, so daily rentals become a more convenient and cheaper option. The frontend was built in plain Vue.js with a mobile-first approach, while the SlimPHP admin centralizes products, images, pricing, ordering, and reservations. The system also generates PDF contracts and automatically calculates the rental period with the related products.
highlights: Mobile-first showcase site for a local business
Product CRUD with ordering, images, and pricing
Reservation / contract PDF with automatic calculation
Focused on rentals for families visiting Salvador

cidabio.name: Cida Bio
cidabio.description: Bio-style landing page to highlight properties in the Instagram bio.
cidabio.longDescription: Cida Bio is a static site in a bio-site style, designed to work as a digital business card and a highlight page for up to two properties. Its main purpose is to be linked from the broker's Instagram bio and draw attention to the listings that need more visibility. The focus is on being lightweight, visual, and direct, without CMS complexity, to support fast promotion of real estate opportunities.

cosmonumero.name: Cosmo Número
cosmonumero.description: Numerology consultation with payments, AI, and PDF, built as a hands-on technical experiment.
cosmonumero.longDescription: Cosmo Número was built more as a hands-on manual experiment than as a continuously evolving product. The application delivers personalized numerology consultations with OpenAI, Mercado Pago payments, PDF generation, and SQLite persistence, all in a straightforward stack using PHP, Vue, and deploy automation. The project is already finished but paused, and it may later be folded into the Raphael Hub ecosystem.

cidaimoveis.name: Cida Imóveis
cidaimoveis.description: Institutional site for property catalog and promotion.
cidaimoveis.longDescription: Cida Imóveis is a more complete institutional site for the broker, built to organize property catalog, presentation, and promotion in a professional way. The idea is to expand commercial reach, provide a more robust browsing experience, and keep a base ready for future evolution. Although the architectural direction is already defined with Nuxt on the front and Laravel on the backend, the project is still in progress and the ecosystem has not been fully published yet.

contact.title: Let's Work Together?
contact.description: I'm always open to new projects, contracts, and opportunities. If you need a senior software engineer who understands business and delivers autonomously, get in touch.

footer.manifesto: Building > Planning · Doing > Thinking · Freedom > Status
